psalms: Blessed{H835} is the man{H376} that walketh{H1980} not in the counsel{H6098} of the wicked,{H7563} Nor standeth{H5975} in the way{H1870} of sinners,{H2400} Nor sitteth{H3427} in the seat{H4186} of scoffers:{H3887}
But his delight{H2656} is in the law{H8451} of Jehovah;{H3068} And on his law{H8451} doth he meditate{H1897} day{H3119} and night.{H3915}

And he shall be like a tree{H6086} planted{H8362} by the streams{H6388} of water,{H4325} That bringeth forth{H5414} its fruit{H6529} in its season,{H6256} Whose leaf{H5929} also doth not wither;{H5034} And whatsoever he doeth{H6213} shall prosper.{H6743}
The wicked{H7563} are not so, But are like the chaff{H4671} which the wind{H7307} driveth away.{H5086}
Therefore the wicked{H7563} shall not stand{H6965} in the judgment,{H4941} Nor sinners{H2400} in the congregation{H5712} of the righteous.{H6662}
For Jehovah{H3068} knoweth{H3045} the way{H1870} of the righteous;{H6662} But the way{H1870} of the wicked{H7563} shall perish.{H6}
Why do the nations{H1471} rage,{H7283} And the peoples{H3816} meditate{H1897} a vain thing?{H7385}
The kings{H4428} of the earth{H776} set{H3320} themselves, And the rulers{H7336} take counsel{H3245} together,{H3162} Against Jehovah,{H3068} and against his anointed,{H4899} [saying],
Let us break{H5423} their bonds{H4147} asunder,{H5423} And cast away{H7993} their cords{H5688} from us.
He that sitteth{H3427} in the heavens{H8064} will laugh:{H7832} The Lord{H136} will have them in derision.{H3932}
Then will he speak{H1696} unto them in his wrath,{H639} And vex{H926} them in his sore displeasure:{H2740}
Yet I have set{H5258} my king{H4428} Upon my holy{H6944} hill{H2022} of Zion.{H6726}
I will tell{H5608} of the decree:{H2706} Jehovah{H3068} said{H559} unto me, Thou art my son;{H1121} This day{H3117} have I begotten{H3205} thee.
Ask{H7592} of me, and I will give{H5414} [thee] the nations{H1471} for thine inheritance,{H5159} And the uttermost parts{H657} of the earth{H776} for thy possession.{H272}
Thou shalt break{H7489} them with a rod{H7626} of iron;{H1270} Thou shalt dash them in pieces{H5310} like a potter's{H3335} vessel.{H3627}
Now therefore be wise,{H7919} O ye kings:{H4428} Be instructed,{H3256} ye judges{H8199} of the earth.{H776}
Serve{H5647} Jehovah{H3068} with fear,{H3374} And rejoice{H1523} with trembling.{H7461}

Kiss{H5401} the son,{H1248} lest he be angry,{H599} and ye perish{H6} in the way,{H1870} For his wrath{H639} will soon be{H4592} kindled.{H1197} Blessed{H835} are all they that take refuge{H2620} in him.
A Psalm of David, when he fled from Absalom his son. Jehovah,{H3068} how are mine adversaries{H6862} increased!{H7231} Many{H7227} are they that rise up{H6965} against me.
Many{H7227} there are that say{H559} of my soul,{H5315} There is no help{H3444} for him in God.{H430} {H5542}
But thou, O Jehovah,{H3068} art a shield{H4043} about me; My glory{H3519} and the lifter up{H7311} of my head.{H7218}
I cry{H7121} unto Jehovah{H3068} with my voice,{H6963} And he answereth{H6030} me out of his holy{H6944} hill.{H2022} {Selah}{H5542}
I laid me down{H7901} and slept;{H3462} I awaked;{H6974} For Jehovah{H3068} sustaineth{H5564} me.
I will not be afraid{H3372} of ten thousands{H7233} of the people{H5971} That have set{H7896} themselves against me round about.{H5439}

Arise,{H6965} O Jehovah;{H3068} Save{H3467} me, O my God:{H430} For thou hast smitten{H5221} all mine enemies{H341} upon the cheek bone;{H3895} Thou hast broken{H7665} the teeth{H8127} of the wicked.{H7563}
Salvation{H3444} belongeth unto Jehovah:{H3068} Thy blessing{H1293} be upon thy people.{H5971} {Selah}{H5542}

For the Chief Musician; on stringed instruments. A Psalm of David. Answer{H6030} me when I call,{H7121} O God{H430} of my righteousness;{H6664} Thou hast set me at large{H7337} [when I was] in distress:{H6862} Have mercy{H2603} upon me, and hear{H8085} my prayer.{H8605}

O ye sons{H1121} of men,{H376} how long{H5704} shall my glory{H3519} be turned into dishonor?{H3639} [How long] will ye love{H157} vanity,{H7385} and seek{H1245} after falsehood?{H3577} {Selah}{H5542}
But know{H3045} that Jehovah{H3068} hath set apart{H6395} for himself him that is godly:{H2623} Jehovah{H3068} will hear{H8085} when I call{H7121} unto him.
Stand in awe,{H7264} and sin{H2398} not: Commune{H559} with your own heart{H3824} upon your bed,{H4904} and be still.{H1826} {Selah}{H5542}
Offer{H2076} the sacrifices{H2077} of righteousness,{H6664} And put your trust{H982} in Jehovah.{H3068}
Many{H7227} there are that say,{H559} Who will show{H7200} us [any] good?{H2896} Jehovah,{H3068} lift thou up{H5375} the light{H216} of thy countenance{H6440} upon us.
Thou hast put{H5414} gladness{H8057} in my heart,{H3820} More than [they have] when{H6256} their grain{H1715} and their new wine{H8492} are increased.{H7231}
In peace{H7965} will I both{H3162} lay me down{H7901} and sleep;{H3462} For thou, Jehovah,{H3068} alone{H910} makest me dwell{H3427} in safety.{H983}
For the Chief Musician; with the Nehiloth. A Psalm of David. Give ear{H238} to my words,{H561} O Jehovah,{H3068} Consider{H995} my meditation.{H1901}
Hearken{H7181} unto the voice{H6963} of my cry,{H7773} my King,{H4428} and my God;{H430} For unto thee do I pray.{H6419}
O Jehovah,{H3068} in the morning{H1242} shalt thou hear{H8085} my voice;{H6963} In the morning{H1242} will I order{H6186} [my prayer] unto thee, and will keep watch.{H6822}
For thou art not a God{H410} that hath pleasure{H2655} in wickedness:{H7562} Evil{H7451} shall not sojourn{H1481} with thee.
The arrogant{H1984} shall not stand{H3320} in thy sight:{H5869} Thou hatest{H8130} all workers{H6466} of iniquity.{H205}
Thou wilt destroy{H6} them that speak{H1696} lies:{H3577} Jehovah{H3068} abhorreth{H8581} the blood-thirsty{H1818} and deceitful{H4820} man.{H376}
But as for me, in the abundance{H7230} of thy lovingkindness{H2617} will I come{H935} into thy house:{H1004} In thy fear{H3374} will I worship{H7812} toward thy holy{H6944} temple.{H1964}
Lead{H5148} me, O Jehovah,{H3068} in thy righteousness{H6666} because of mine enemies;{H8324} Make thy way{H1870} straight{H3474} before my face.{H6440}

For there is no faithfulness{H3559} in their mouth;{H6310} Their inward{H7130} part is very wickedness;{H1942} Their throat{H1627} is an open{H6605} sepulchre;{H6913} They flatter{H2505} with their tongue.{H3956}

Hold them guilty,{H816} O God;{H430} Let them fall{H5307} by their own counsels;{H4156} Thrust them out{H5080} in the multitude{H7230} of their transgressions;{H6588} For they have rebelled{H4784} against thee.

But let all those that take refuge{H2620} in thee rejoice,{H8055} Let them ever{H5769} shout for joy,{H7442} because thou defendest{H5526} them: Let them also that love{H157} thy name{H8034} be joyful{H5970} in thee.
For thou wilt bless{H1288} the righteous;{H6662} O Jehovah,{H3068} thou wilt compass{H5849} him with favor{H7522} as with a shield.{H6793}

For the Chief Musician; on stringed instruments, set to the Sheminith. A Psalm of David. O Jehovah,{H3068} rebuke{H3198} me not in thine anger,{H639} Neither chasten{H3256} me in thy hot displeasure.{H2534}
Have mercy{H2603} upon me, O Jehovah;{H3068} for I am withered{H536} away: O Jehovah,{H3068} heal{H7495} me; for my bones{H6106} are troubled.{H926}
My soul{H5315} also is sore{H3966} troubled:{H926} And thou, O Jehovah,{H3068} how long?
Return,{H7725} O Jehovah,{H3068} deliver{H2502} my soul:{H5315} Save{H3467} me for thy lovingkindness'{H2617} sake.
For in death{H4194} there is no remembrance{H2143} of thee: In Sheol{H7585} who shall give thee thanks?{H3034}
I am weary{H3021} with my groaning;{H585} Every night{H3915} make I my bed{H4296} to swim;{H7811} I water{H4529} my couch{H4296} with my tears.{H1832}
Mine eye{H5869} wasteth{H6244} away because of grief;{H3708} It waxeth old{H6275} because of all mine adversaries.{H6887}
Depart{H5493} from me, all ye workers{H6466} of iniquity;{H205} For Jehovah{H3068} hath heard{H8085} the voice{H6963} of my weeping.{H1065}
Jehovah{H3068} hath heard{H8085} my supplication;{H8467} Jehovah{H3068} will receive{H3947} my prayer.{H8605}
All mine enemies{H341} shall be put to shame{H954} and sore{H3966} troubled:{H926} They shall turn back,{H7725} they shall be put to shame{H954} suddenly.{H7281}

Shiggaion of David, which he sang unto Jehovah, concerning the words of Cush a Benjamite. O Jehovah{H3068} my God,{H430} in thee do I take refuge:{H2620} Save{H3467} me from all them that pursue{H7291} me, and deliver{H5337} me,
Lest they tear{H2963} my soul{H5315} like a lion,{H738} Rending it in pieces,{H6561} while there is none to deliver.{H5337}
O Jehovah{H3068} my God,{H430} if I have done{H6213} this; If there be{H3426} iniquity{H5766} in my hands;{H3709}
If I have rewarded{H1580} evil{H7451} unto him that was at peace{H7999} with me; (Yea, I have delivered{H2502} him that without cause{H7387} was mine adversary;){H6887}
Let the enemy{H341} pursue{H7291} my soul,{H5315} and overtake{H5381} it; Yea, let him tread my life{H2416} down{H7429} to the earth,{H776} And lay{H7931} my glory{H3519} in the dust.{H6083} {H5542}
Arise,{H6965} O Jehovah,{H3068} in thine anger;{H639} Lift up{H5375} thyself against the rage{H5678} of mine adversaries,{H6887} And awake{H5782} for me; thou hast commanded{H6680} judgment.{H4941}
And let the congregation{H5712} of the peoples{H3816} compass thee about;{H5437} And over them return{H7725} thou on high.{H4791}
Jehovah{H3068} ministereth judgment{H1777} to the peoples:{H5971} Judge{H8199} me, O Jehovah,{H3068} according to my righteousness,{H6664} and to mine integrity{H8537} that is in me.

O let the wickedness{H7451} of the wicked{H7563} come to an end,{H1584} but establish{H3559} thou the righteous:{H6662} For the righteous{H6662} God{H430} trieth{H974} the minds{H3629} and hearts.{H3826}
My shield{H4043} is with God,{H430} Who saveth{H3467} the upright{H3477} in heart.{H3820}
God{H430} is a righteous{H6662} judge,{H8199} Yea, a God{H410} that hath indignation{H2194} every day.{H3117}
If a man turn{H7725} not, he will whet{H3913} his sword;{H2719} He hath bent{H1869} his bow,{H7198} and made it ready.{H3559}
He hath also prepared{H3559} for him the instruments{H3627} of death;{H4194} He maketh{H6466} his arrows{H2671} fiery [shafts].{H1814}
Behold, he travaileth{H2254} with iniquity;{H205} Yea, he hath conceived{H2029} mischief,{H5999} and brought forth{H3205} falsehood.{H8267}
He hath made{H3738} a pit,{H953} and digged{H2658} it, And is fallen{H5307} into the ditch{H7845} which he made.{H6466}
His mischief{H5999} shall return{H7725} upon his own head,{H7218} And his violence{H2555} shall come down{H3381} upon his own pate.{H6936}
I will give thanks{H3034} unto Jehovah{H3068} according to his righteousness,{H6664} And will sing praise{H2167} to the name{H8034} of Jehovah{H3068} Most High.{H5945}

For the Chief Musician; set to the Gittith. A Psalm of David. O Jehovah,{H3068} our Lord,{H113} How excellent{H117} is thy name{H8034} in all the earth,{H776} Who hast set{H5414} thy glory{H1935} upon the heavens!{H8064}

Out of the mouth{H6310} of babes{H5768} and sucklings{H3243} hast thou established{H3245} strength,{H5797} because of thine adversaries,{H6887} that thou mightest still{H7673} the enemy{H341} and the avenger.{H5358}
When I consider{H7200} thy heavens,{H8064} the work{H4639} of thy fingers,{H676} The moon{H3394} and the stars,{H3556} which thou hast ordained;{H3559}
What is man,{H582} that thou art mindful{H2142} of him? And the son{H1121} of man,{H120} that thou visitest{H6485} him?
For thou hast made him but little{H4592} lower{H2637} than God,{H430} And crownest{H5849} him with glory{H3519} and honor.{H3519}
Thou makest him to have dominion{H4910} over the works{H4639} of thy hands;{H3027} Thou hast put{H7896} all things under his feet:{H7272}
All sheep{H6792} and oxen,{H504} Yea, and the beasts{H929} of the field,{H7704}
The birds{H6833} of the heavens,{H8064} and the fish{H1709} of the sea,{H3220} Whatsoever passeth through{H5674} the paths{H734} of the seas.{H3220}
O Jehovah,{H3068} our Lord,{H113} How excellent{H117} is thy name{H8034} in all the earth!{H776}
For the Chief Musician; set to Muth-labben. A Psalm of David. I will give thanks{H3034} unto Jehovah{H3068} with my whole heart;{H3820} I will show forth{H5608} all thy marvellous works.{H6381}
I will be glad{H8055} and exult{H5970} in thee; I will sing praise{H2167} to thy name,{H8034} O thou Most High.{H5945}
When mine enemies{H341} turn{H7725} back,{H268} They stumble{H3782} and perish{H6} at thy presence.{H6440}
For thou hast maintained{H6213} my right{H4941} and my cause;{H1779} Thou sittest{H3427} in the throne{H3678} judging{H8199} righteously.{H6664}
Thou hast rebuked{H1605} the nations,{H1471} thou hast destroyed{H6} the wicked;{H7563} Thou hast blotted out{H4229} their name{H8034} for ever{H5769} and ever.{H5703}

The enemy{H341} are come to an end,{H8552} they are desolate{H2723} for ever;{H5331} And the cities{H6145} which thou hast overthrown,{H5428} The very remembrance{H2143} of them{H1992} is perished.{H6}
[But Jehovah]{H3068} [sitteth]{H3427} [as king] for ever:{H5769} He hath prepared{H3559} his throne{H3678} for judgment;{H4941}
And he will judge{H8199} the world{H8398} in righteousness,{H6664} He will minister judgment{H1777} to the peoples{H3816} in uprightness.{H4339}
Jehovah{H3068} also will be a high tower{H4869} for the oppressed,{H1790} A high tower{H4869} in times{H6256} of trouble;{H6869}
And they that know{H3045} thy name{H8034} will put their trust{H982} in thee; For thou, Jehovah,{H3068} hast not forsaken{H5800} them that seek{H1875} thee.
Sing praises{H2167} to Jehovah,{H3068} who dwelleth{H3427} in Zion:{H6726} Declare{H5046} among the people{H5971} his doings.{H5949}
For he that maketh inquisition{H1875} for blood{H1818} remembereth{H2142} them; He forgetteth{H7911} not the cry{H6818} of the poor.{H6035}
Have mercy{H2603} upon me, O Jehovah;{H3068} Behold{H7200} my affliction{H6040} [which I suffer] of them that hate{H8130} me, Thou that liftest me up{H7311} from the gates{H8179} of death;{H4194}
That I may show forth{H5608} all thy praise.{H8416} In the gates{H8179} of the daughter{H1323} of Zion{H6726} I will rejoice{H1523} in thy salvation.{H3444}
The nations{H1471} are sunk down{H2883} in the pit{H7845} that they made:{H6213} In the net{H7568} which{H2098} they hid{H2934} is their own foot{H7272} taken.{H3920}
Jehovah{H3068} hath made himself known,{H3045} he hath executed{H6213} judgment:{H4941} The wicked{H7563} is snared{H5367} in the work{H6467} of his own hands.{H3709} {H1902} Selah}{H5542}
The wicked{H7563} shall be turned{H7725} back unto Sheol,{H7585} Even all the nations{H1471} that forget{H7913} God.{H430}
For the needy{H34} shall not alway{H5331} be forgotten,{H7911} Nor the expectation{H8615} of the poor{H6041} perish{H6} for ever.{H5703}
Arise,{H6965} O Jehovah;{H3068} Let not man{H582} prevail:{H5810} Let the nations{H1471} be judged{H8199} in thy sight.{H6440}
Put{H7896} them in fear,{H4172} O Jehovah:{H3068} Let the nations{H1471} know{H3045} themselves to be but men.{H582} {Selah}{H5542}
Why standest{H5975} thou afar off,{H7350} O Jehovah?{H3068} Why hidest{H5956} thou thyself in times{H6256} of trouble?{H6869}
In the pride{H1346} of the wicked{H7563} the poor{H6041} is hotly pursued;{H1814} Let them be taken{H8610} in the devices{H4209} that{H2098} they have conceived.{H2803}
For the wicked{H7563} boasteth{H1984} of his heart's{H5315} desire,{H8378} And the covetous{H1214} renounceth,{H1288} [yea], contemneth{H5006} Jehovah.{H3068}
The wicked,{H7563} in the pride{H1363} of his countenance,{H639} [saith], He will not require{H1875} [it]. All his thoughts{H4209} are, There is no God.{H430}
His ways{H1870} are firm{H2342} at all times;{H6256} Thy judgments{H4941} are far above{H4791} out of his sight: As for all his adversaries,{H6887} he puffeth{H6315} at them.
He saith{H559} in his heart,{H3820} I shall not be moved;{H4131} To all generations{H1755} I shall not be in adversity.{H7451}
His mouth{H6310} is full{H4390} of cursing{H423} and deceit{H4820} and oppression:{H8496} Under his tongue{H3956} is mischief{H5999} and iniquity.{H205}

He sitteth{H3427} in the lurking-places{H3993} of the villages;{H2691} In the secret places{H3993} doth he murder{H2026} the innocent;{H5355} His eyes{H5869} are privily set{H6845} against the helpless.{H2489}

He lurketh{H693} in secret{H4565} as a lion{H738} in his covert;{H5520} He lieth in wait{H693} to catch{H2414} the poor:{H6041} He doth catch{H2414} the poor,{H6041} when he draweth{H4900} him in his net.{H7568}
He croucheth,{H1794} he boweth{H7817} down, And the helpless{H2489} fall{H5307} by his strong ones.{H6099}
He saith{H559} in his heart,{H3820} God{H410} hath forgotten;{H7911} He hideth{H5641} his face;{H6440} he will never{H5331} see{H7200} it.
Arise,{H6965} O Jehovah;{H3068} O God,{H410} lift up{H5375} thy hand:{H3027} Forget{H7911} not the poor.{H6035}
Wherefore doth the wicked{H7563} contemn{H5006} God,{H430} And say{H559} in his heart,{H3820} Thou wilt not require{H1875} [it]?

Thou hast seen{H7200} [it]; for thou beholdest{H5027} mischief{H5999} and spite,{H3708} to requite{H5414} it with thy hand:{H3027} The helpless{H2489} committeth{H5800} [himself] unto thee; Thou hast been the helper{H5826} of the fatherless.{H3490}
Break{H7665} thou the arm{H2220} of the wicked;{H7563} And as for the evil{H7451} man, seek out{H1875} his wickedness{H7562} till thou find{H4672} none.{H1077}
Jehovah{H3068} is King{H4428} for ever{H5769} and ever:{H5769} The nations{H1471} are perished{H6} out of his land.{H776}
Jehovah,{H3068} thou hast heard{H8085} the desire{H8378} of the meek:{H6035} Thou wilt prepare{H3559} their heart,{H3820} thou wilt cause thine ear{H241} to hear;{H7181}
To judge{H8199} the fatherless{H3490} and the oppressed,{H1790} That man{H582} who is of the earth{H776} may be terrible{H6206} no more.{H3254}
For the Chief Musician. [A Psalm] of David. In Jehovah{H3068} do I take refuge:{H2620} How say{H559} ye to my soul,{H5315} Flee{H5110} [as] a bird{H6833} to your mountain;{H2022}

For, lo, the wicked{H7563} bend{H1869} the bow,{H7198} They make ready{H3559} their arrow{H2671} upon the string,{H3499} That they may shoot{H3384} in darkness{H652} at the upright{H3477} in heart;{H3820}
If the foundations{H8356} be destroyed,{H2040} What can the righteous{H6662} do?{H6466}

Jehovah{H3068} is in his holy{H6944} temple;{H1964} Jehovah,{H3068} his throne{H3678} is in heaven;{H8064} His eyes{H5869} behold,{H2372} his eyelids{H6079} try,{H974} the children{H1121} of men.{H120}
Jehovah{H3068} trieth{H974} the righteous;{H6662} But the wicked{H7563} and him that loveth{H157} violence{H2555} his soul{H5315} hateth.{H8130}
Upon the wicked{H7563} he will rain{H4305} snares;{H6341} Fire{H784} and brimstone{H1614} and burning{H2152} wind{H7307} shall be the portion{H4521} of their cup.{H3563}
For Jehovah{H3068} is righteous;{H6662} He loveth{H157} righteousness:{H6666} The upright{H6662} shall behold{H2372} his face.{H6440}

For the Chief Musician; set to the Sheminith. A Psalm of David. Help,{H3467} Jehovah;{H3068} For the godly man{H120} ceaseth;{H1584} For the faithful{H539} fail{H6461} from among the children{H1121} of men.{H120}
They speak{H1696} falsehood{H7723} every one{H376} with his neighbor:{H7453} With flattering{H2513} lip,{H8193} and with a double{H3820} heart,{H3820} do they speak.{H1696}
Jehovah{H3068} will cut off{H3772} all flattering{H2513} lips,{H8193} The tongue{H3956} that speaketh{H1696} great{H1419} things;
Who have said,{H559} With our tongue{H3956} will we prevail;{H1396} Our lips{H8193} are our own: Who is lord{H113} over us?

Because of the oppression{H7701} of the poor,{H6041} because of the sighing{H603} of the needy,{H34} Now will I arise,{H6965} saith{H559} Jehovah;{H3068} I will set{H7896} him in the safety{H3468} he panteth{H6315} for.
